name: com.voidwireinteractive.messaging
description: A high-performance, AMQP-style in-process message bus for Unity 6.3. Supports pub/sub, queue, and request/reply routing across Assemblies and scenes via a ScriptableObject-based broker.

samples.description: TestSender and TestReceiver demonstrating publish/subscribe with a PlayerLevelUp message. Also multiple showcases of cross scene data communications and behavioral showcases of the message routing types.
